title: SIMPLICITY (AIO)
description: I created this modpack because I don't want it to be vanilla but not too mod too!
body:
# Welcome to Simplicity !
**A minecraft modpack** designed to **enhance** your gaming experience **without overloading it**. 
It's derived from the words "simple" and "efficient".

Say **goodbye to vanilla monotony** without plunging into heavy modding. With Simplicity, you'll find the **perfect balance** between game-enhancing enhancements while retaining the essence of Minecraft's charm.

Embark on new journeys with greater freedom as you explore the skies with _aircraft_ mod and the seas with _ships_ mod. Navigate effortlessly with the addition of _Xaero_ mini-map and full-scale map. Cross the world without hindrance thanks to teleportation stones displayed on your world map.

Immerse yourself in enhanced landscapes thanks to carefully selected terrain generation mods for the Nether, the End and the caverns of Overworld. But also discover new dimensions beyond imagination, including the legendary Aether.
